statement: In static diagonal spherical symmetry, kappa is a gauge-aware orbit-space diagnostic: kappa = 1/2 ln(A/|∇R|^2), where |∇R|^2 is the orbit-space norm of the areal-radius scalar gradient. Compensation kappa=0 means A=|∇R|^2. This is not a 4D scalar field.

messages: Tier 2 claim lacks reason, provenance, evidence, or obligation links.
